description: Create a visual Kanban board for the 'Inventory Migration' project in EdrawMax. The board must include the title 'Sprint 24 - Inventory Migration' and four vertical columns labeled 'Backlog', 'In Progress', 'Code Review', and 'Done'. Add the following task cards with their specified background colors to the appropriate columns: 'User Audit Logs' (Blue) in 'Backlog'; 'API Rate Limiting' (Blue) in 'In Progress'; 'Fix Null Pointer Exception' (Red) and 'Schema Validation' (Blue) in 'Code Review'; and 'Legacy DB Backup' (Green) in 'Done'. Save the diagram to /home/ga/Documents/sprint_board.eddx and export it as an image to /home/ga/Documents/sprint_board.png.
